channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Astronauts on International Space Station take shelter in SpaceX Dragon as cosmonauts try to fix air leak - Space
item.description:
1. Astronauts on International Space Station take shelter in SpaceX Dragon as cosmonauts try to fix air leak  Space

  3. International Space Station astronauts resume normal duties after evacuation order  The Guardian
  4. NASA Provides Update on Space Station Leak  NASA (.gov)
  5. NASA lifts order for International Space Station astronauts to shelter in Dragon spacecraft amid ongoing air leaks  Yahoo

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Scientists find wind blowing from our Milky Way's black hole after half-century search: 'There it is' - Space
item.description:
1. Scientists find wind blowing from our Milky Way's black hole after half-century search: 'There it is'  Space
  2. Wind from Milky Way's supermassive black hole is finally discovered  Reuters
  3. Even quiet black holes create winds, new Milky Way observations reveal  Science News
  4. Astronomers just solved a 50-year-old mystery about the Milky Way’s black hole  Scientific American
  5. They've Been Searching for the Milky Way's Black Hole Wind for 50 Years and Finally Found It  Universe Today

item.title: New Microraptorine Dinosaur Discovered in China - Sci.News
item.description:
1. New Microraptorine Dinosaur Discovered in China  Sci.News

  3. New Velociraptor cousin was a '4-winged' dragon that hunted prey from the trees of ancient China, fossil find hints  Live Science

  5. New species of dinosaur, a cousin of Velociraptor, probably glided on four “wings” and hunted early birds  Field Museum

item.title: Record ultraviolet quasar wind reaches 30% light speed near supermassive black hole - Phys.org
item.description:

  4. York University Researchers Identify Ultraviolet Wind Moving at One-Third the Speed of Light Near Quasar  geneonline.com

item.title: James Webb telescope discovers most distant 'dormant' black hole in the universe, and it weighs as much as 6 billion suns - Live Science
item.description:
1. James Webb telescope discovers most distant 'dormant' black hole in the universe, and it weighs as much as 6 billion suns  Live Science
  2. A direct black-hole mass measurement in a little red dot at high redshift  Nature
  3. JWST spots dormant black hole 10 billion light-years from Earth  Popular Science
  4. JWST proves that black holes really do come before galaxies  Big Think
  5. James Webb telescope discovers 'naked' black hole that somehow formed before its own galaxy  Live Science

item.title: Interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS is blasting out a bunch of methane. Here's why that's weird - Space
item.description:
1. Interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS is blasting out a bunch of methane. Here's why that's weird  Space
  2. NASA’s Webb Detects Methane on Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS  NASA Science (.gov)
  3. Webb Telescope snaps interstellar comet – proves it's like nothing we've ever seen in our own Solar System  BBC Sky at Night Magazine
  4. REAL STARDUST? 🌠 The European Space Agency has shared the first-ever chemical fingerprint it captured when the interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS exited the solar system after swinging around the Sun. (📷: European Space Agency/IG)  facebook.com
  5. If 3I/ATLAS isn’t an alien probe, why is it silent on radio signals but rich in methane from another star  The Economic Times

item.title: Jupiter’s Great Red Spot is a storm wider than Earth that has raged for at least 150 years. Once large enough to swallow several Earths, it has been shrinking for more than a century, and astronomers can now track its changing size decade by decade. - Space Daily
